faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Gowanus typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: Gowanus properties commonly face infestations from pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in the area's older wooden structures and can cause significant structural damage if left untreated.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Gowanus residents in most cases. Our team understands the urgency of ant infestations and prioritizes rapid response times throughout Brooklyn to prevent colonies from spreading.

faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, pet-friendly, and child-safe ant control products specifically chosen for residential environments.
